solution: 
```class Solution:
    def minPartitions(self, n: str) -> int:
        return max(int(digit) for digit in n)
```

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: This solution works by finding the maximum digit in the input string, which represents the maximum value of a deci-binary number that can be used to sum up to the input number. This approach is efficient because it only requires a single pass through the input string and uses a constant amount of space.
